{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221930191000809234F5A7DAE97D"}"},"total":321},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616300460563481369","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"确实不错，好看，后续店铺位置，员工都得安排吧，而且是不是得给主角安排个系统性学习厨艺，加点设定，不然别人一问专业知识不漏了吗"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773311144,"group_id":"7573636086950267929","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"清风不压乌篷船，梦游天外人世间","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ztIoty1RbZptdf7oxe0QMfo+lYcttQVXIfKdkue9Nu","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1077974962552381","user_name":"天上人间不是梦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1077974962552381","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7573636086950267929","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出，后面会涨）
【美食】+【系统】+【单女主】+【奶爸】+【日常风】
创业失败负债百万的陈秋被迫接手父母留下的小餐馆，
就在走投无路时，觉醒【神级美食签到系统】！
开局签到“神级辣椒炒肉”！
当挂出“88元/份”的招牌时，顾客们都炸了！
“这种黑店，谁吃谁是傻子！”
可没过多久，画风突变！
债主：“求你了，欠的钱我不要了，你就给我吃一口行吗？”
顾客：“就这辣椒炒肉别说88了，888我也愿意排队十小时吃！”
厨神：“和陈先生的厨艺相比，我就是个小卡拉米！”
国宴大师：“只有陈先生做的菜，才配称之为国宴！”
妻女：“爸爸/老公是全天下最厉害的人！”
若干年后，陈秋站在食神争霸赛的领奖台上，望着台下的妻女，无奈摊手：“一开始，我只想挣钱还债......”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6ecc4688a71facecb8252b1c465b98b0","author":"看风月","author_id":"","book_id":"7573636086950267929","book_name":"一天只卖一道菜，我打造美食帝国","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"27.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7573648632394547737","read_count":"274416","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"577742"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"274","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,奶爸,美食,单女主","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0e550f50463456d2c58d9df101447d4b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363019&x-signature=DRB80kfn1wpf6ksmkfr7zdfeVr8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4585638748","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"253"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221930191000809234F5A7DAE97D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"for
